extended-fixed-point.description: Deliberate fixed-point/status regressions: all current fixed-point unittest modules plus aggregate formal-confidence, project-status, handoff, and vertical-demo checks.

fast.description: Default feedback path: every discovered unittest module except the explicit extended fixed-point suite.

all.description: Complete discovered unittest surface, assembled from leaf suites rather than re-listed by hand.

rationale: Keep ordinary feature work on a fast default unittest path.
Preserve explicit operator access to the deeper fixed-point and status regressions.
Fail closed when a hand-maintained suite entry goes stale or discovery finds an unclassified test module.
Compute the all suite from leaf suites so the aggregate cannot drift separately.
non_goals: Do not change proof validators, claim manifests, mathematical semantics, or existing test skip behavior.
Do not replace unittest discovery as the project test substrate.

Do not classify substitution-graph finite-domain, quotation, or other formal-language tests as extended merely because fixed-point validators depend on them; this suite boundary is the current fixed-point campaign surface plus aggregate status/handoff/vertical-demo checks.
